overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Telangana.

rules.title: Review Telangana Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Telangana Shops and Establishments Act is applicable.

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records, attendance records and prescribed notices under Telangana labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices, abstracts and employee information required under Telangana labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Telangana provisions governing working hours, spread-over, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

rules.title: Review Telangana Professional Tax Compliance
rules.description: Determine whether Professional Tax registration, enrolment, deduction, return filing and payment obligations apply under Telangana law.

citations.reference: Telangana Tax on Professions, Trades, Callings and Employments Act

rules.title: Review Telangana Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the Telangana Labour Welfare Fund including employer and employee contribution requirements where applicable.

rules.title: Review Telangana Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest Telangana minimum wage notifications applicable to the scheduled employment.

citations.reference: Government of Telangana Minimum Wage Notifications

rules.title: Monitor Telangana Labour Notifications
rules.description: Review labour department notifications, amendments, exemptions and compliance circulars issued by the Government of Telangana.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering labour registrations, Professional Tax, Labour Welfare Fund, statutory records and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for Professional Tax returns, Labour Welfare Fund contributions, statutory filings, inspections and licence renewals.
